overall.description: Game footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night, transitioning through covered walkways, busy commercial streets, and dark graffiti-covered underpasses, ending with an abrupt cut to daytime driving on elevated highways.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with red steel truss ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered walkway beneath red structural beams

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking ahead in the distance

entered.detail: distinctive red painted steel beams forming the roof structure with integrated lighting
large vertical concrete columns supporting the overhead structure
modern glass building with reflective windows and vertical lines
pile of green garbage bags stacked against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered pedestrian walkway characterized by distinctive red steel trusses overhead and concrete support pillars. The area is dimly lit with artificial lighting, and a few pedestrians are visible walking in the opposite direction. Modern glass buildings line the right side while trash bags are piled against the wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with holographic advertisements

events.description: exits covered walkway into open neon-lit city street with holographic billboards

agents.ego_description: walking along busy sidewalk past vibrant neon signs and holographic advertisements on surrounding skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: person in bright orange pants walking ahead of the camera
pedestrian in red coat walking left across the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive digital billboard displaying a face and advertisements
various colorful neon signs and corporate logos on building facades
tall modern buildings with illuminated windows rising into the night sky

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a vibrant neon-lit commercial street. Massive holographic billboards and colorful neon signs illuminate the area. The character follows a person in bright orange pants while other pedestrians move through the moderate crowd. Glass skyscrapers tower on both sides with sparse vehicle traffic visible on the adjacent road.

events.description: enters darker graffiti-covered underpass area with industrial stairway
ambient lighting shifts from bright neon to dim green and amber industrial lights

agents.ego_description: walking through dimly lit underpass with graffiti-covered concrete walls and industrial stairways

notable_agents.action: person in orange pants and dark jacket continuing ahead into the underpass

entered.detail: concrete stairs and walls covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
exposed metal piping and conduits running along the concrete walls
yellow and black striped concrete barriers blocking part of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, enclosed underpass where the bright neon lights give way to dim industrial lighting. The concrete walls and stairways are covered in extensive graffiti. The space feels more confined and gritty compared to the open commercial street, with exposed pipes and barriers visible. The person in orange pants continues walking ahead as the lighting shifts to darker green and amber tones.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway interchange with multiple overpass levels

events.description: abrupt transition from night walking scene to daytime driving on elevated highways
camera switches from walking pace to vehicle-mounted driving at higher speed

agents.ego_description: driving vehicle through elevated highway corridors and underpasses with sunlight streaming through

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass structure with multiple levels
large concrete columns supporting the elevated highway infrastructure
silver metal safety guardrails along the curved road edge
yellow metal scaffolding attached to adjacent industrial buildings

segments.scene_description: Following an abrupt scene change, the video shifts to daytime driving on elevated highways. The camera moves at vehicle speed through a complex interchange of concrete overpasses and support pillars. Sunlight replaces the neon glow, illuminating the industrial infrastructure and metal guardrails. The area is devoid of pedestrians, with only sparse vehicle traffic visible on the multi-level highway system.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a dimly lit urban walkway through a vibrant neon district and a gritty underpass, before abruptly shifting to a sunlit highway. It begins within a covered pedestrian passage defined by red steel trusses and concrete pillars, moving past glass buildings and piles of trash. As the camera emerges from the shelter, the environment opens into a brilliant commercial street filled with towering holographic billboards and colorful neon signs. The scene then narrows into a confined, graffiti-covered underpass where the vibrant lights fade into dim green and amber industrial tones. Finally, the perspective shifts instantly to a high-speed daytime drive across an elevated highway system, where bright sunlight illuminates a complex network of concrete overpasses and metal guardrails.
